name: Red Lentil Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the dried red lentils and water. Stir until all the lentils are covered.
3. Add the rolled oats, egg replacer, and additional water to the lentil mixture. Mix well.
4. Incorporate the cooked brown rice, grated carrots, tamari, scallions, garlic, and sage into the mixture. Combine thoroughly.
5. Transfer the mixture to a greased loaf pan.
6. Place the pan in the preheated oven.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the loaf is set and golden brown on top.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
